name: lark-cli-skills
description: Lazy-loaded official Lark CLI workflows for operating Lark and Feishu from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Lark and Feishu with the official CLI skills.
interface.longDescription: A synchronized collection of the official larksuite/cli skills for messages, docs, calendar, tasks, mail, meetings, Base, Sheets, and other Lark services.
defaultPrompt: Show my Lark agenda and unfinished tasks for today.
Summarize my recent Lark messages and meetings.
Help me create or update content in Lark.
